hooks.command: input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.liquid ]] && shopify theme check "$file" --fail-level error 2>&1 | tail -30 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.css ]] && npx stylelint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
input=$(cat) && file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.js ]] && npx eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

input=$(cat) && prompt=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('prompt',''); m=re.match(r'^/(?:shopify-theme-toolkit:)?(clarify|plan|execute|test|code-review|fix|figma|compare|research|understand|liquid-standards|section-standards|css-standards|js-standards|theme-architecture)\b', p); print(m.group(1) if m else '')" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$prompt" ] && skill="$prompt" && user_email=$(git config user.email 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && user_name=$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && project=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || basename "$(pwd)") && ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && payload=$(SKILL="$skill" USER_EMAIL="$user_email" USER_NAME="$user_name" PROJECT="$project" TS="$ts" python3 -c "import json,os; print(json.dumps({'event_type':'skill_invocation','skill':os.environ['SKILL'],'user_email':os.environ['USER_EMAIL'],'user_name':os.environ['USER_NAME'],'project':os.environ['PROJECT'],'timestamp':os.environ['TS'],'token':'shopify-theme-toolkit'}))") && curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST 'https://j32l7w0fjb.execute-api.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/Prod/analytics/ingest' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$payload" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

input=$(cat) && source_type=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('source',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ "$source_type" = "startup" ] && model=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('model','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null) && user_email=$(git config user.email 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && user_name=$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && project=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || basename "$(pwd)") && ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && payload=$(USER_EMAIL="$user_email" USER_NAME="$user_name" PROJECT="$project" TS="$ts" MODEL="$model" python3 -c "import json,os; print(json.dumps({'event_type':'session_start','user_email':os.environ['USER_EMAIL'],'user_name':os.environ['USER_NAME'],'project':os.environ['PROJECT'],'models_used':[os.environ['MODEL']],'timestamp':os.environ['TS'],'token':'shopify-theme-toolkit'}))") && curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST 'https://j32l7w0fjb.execute-api.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/Prod/analytics/ingest' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$payload" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

input=$(cat) && parsed=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('transcript_path','') + '|' + d.get('session_id',''))" 2>/dev/null) && transcript="${parsed%%|*}" && session_id="${parsed##*|}" && [ -n "$transcript" ] && [ -f "$transcript" ] && [ -n "$session_id" ] && user_email=$(git config user.email 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && user_name=$(git config user.name 2>/dev/null || echo unknown) && project=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || basename "$(pwd)") && ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") && result=$(TRANSCRIPT="$transcript" python3 -c "import json,os; total=0; models=set(); f=open(os.environ['TRANSCRIPT']); lines=[line.strip() for line in f]; f.close(); [None for line in lines if (d:=json.loads(line)) and isinstance(d.get('message'),dict) and 'usage' in d['message'] and (u:=d['message']['usage']) is not None and ((total:=total+u.get('input_tokens',0)+u.get('output_tokens',0)+u.get('cache_read_input_tokens',0)+u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens',0)) or True) and models.add(d['message'].get('model','unknown'))]; print(json.dumps({'total_tokens':total,'models_used':list(models-{None,'<synthetic>'})}))") && payload=$(USER_EMAIL="$user_email" USER_NAME="$user_name" PROJECT="$project" TS="$ts" SESSION_ID="$session_id" RESULT="$result" python3 -c "import json,os; r=json.loads(os.environ['RESULT']); print(json.dumps({'event_type':'token_update','session_id':os.environ['SESSION_ID'],'user_email':os.environ['USER_EMAIL'],'user_name':os.environ['USER_NAME'],'project':os.environ['PROJECT'],'total_tokens':r['total_tokens'],'models_used':r['models_used'],'timestamp':os.environ['TS'],'token':'shopify-theme-toolkit'}))") && curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST 'https://j32l7w0fjb.execute-api.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/Prod/analytics/ingest' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$payload" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
